name: 6q14_1_recurrent_microdeletion
description: 6q14.1 recurrent microdeletion region — a non-NAHR-driven but recurrent ~5 Mb interstitial deletion associated with intellectual disability and seizures. Some breakpoints cluster at short flanking SDs (~96% identity), others at LINE-1 / Alu pairs (non-allelic homologous recombination via interspersed repeats).

architecture.internal_structure: Heterogeneous breakpoints: ~30% at flanking SDs of ~15-50 kb at ~95% identity, remainder at L1/Alu pairs; unique core contains SENP6, TPBG, MYO6, IMPG1.
